headline: VOYA Stock Hits Record High, Tops $100 For The First Time Ever – Report Says Voya Financial Has Been ‘Fielding’ Takeover Interest
summary: The report said Principal Financial had expressed interest earlier this year, but nothing came of the approach.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Kenvue, Raises Price Target to $20
summary: UBS  analyst Peter Grom   maintains Kenvue (NYSE:KVUE) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $18 to $20.
